summary: Handheld footage of an ICE/ATF arrest in suburban Chicago of a Laotian criminal alien pulled from a vehicle, opening on a close-up of a POLICE vest and an officer narrating the subject's removal order and convictions. It is documentary arrest footage, not a music-driven or stylized produced spectacle.
notable_text: Vests read POLICE, ATF/ICE; officer narrates final order of removal and criminal history
